qa_pairs.question: What is the result of a Weights & Biases (wandb) training run when conducted in offline mode?
qa_pairs.answer: After a training run in offline mode, a new folder named `./wandb/offline-run*` will be created.

qa_pairs.question: How can users upload metrics from an offline Weights & Biases (wandb) training run to the server?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can send the metrics to the server after an offline training run by using the command `wandb sync ./wandb/offline-run*`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the effect of using the `*` wildcard when syncing offline Weights & Biases (wandb) runs to the server?
qa_pairs.answer: When syncing offline Weights & Biases (wandb) runs to the server, using `*` in the command `wandb sync ./wandb/offline-run*` will sync all runs.
